algorithms.title: Cardiac Chest Pain Assessment Sequence
algorithms.description: A systematic approach to the chest pain patient using CBIGK and 12-lead interpretation.
steps: Assess CBIGK: Chest pain characteristics, Blood pressure, Irregular pulse, Glucose, Potassium.
Identify inferior changes (II, III, aVF) or anterior changes (V1-V4).
If ST depression appears in V1-V4 without clear elevation elsewhere, consider posterior MI.
If the 12-lead is non-diagnostic but suspicion for inferior MI remains (especially with hypotension), obtain a right-sided ECG.
Check for Beck's triad (JVD, muffled heart tones, hypotension) — if present, consider cardiac tamponade.
Avoid nitrates/vasodilators if right ventricular involvement or hypotension is suspected.
